Node.help: API to the TestServer DataStore for ViewTemplates

Struct.name: TemplateInfo
Struct.help: Structure to describe a template in the TestServer DataStore

Member.name: statSourceTypes
Member.help: The stat source types included in a template

Member.name: userDefined
Member.help: A template can be user defined or system defined. System defined is not editable by a user

Member.name: enabled
Member.help: Enabled templates will be added to the stat view list when commitCatalog is called for matching statSourceTypes

Method2.name: Create
Method2.help: Creates a new stat view without adding it to the DataStore

Method2.name: Add
Method2.help: Adds a new stat view to the DataStore

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: Properties of the stat view for the new template

Method2.name: Delete
Method2.help: Deletes a template from the DataStore

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the template to delete

Method2.name: Exists
Method2.help: Checks if a template already exists in the DataStore

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the template to check for

Method2.name: GetList
Method2.help: Get a list of all of the templates in the DataStore for a client application

Method2.name: GetViewXml
Method2.help: Get the stat view xml of a template in the DataStore

Method2.name: Rename
Method2.help: Rename a template in the DataStore

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the template to rename

Argument.name: newName
Argument.help: The new name for the template

Method2.name: Enable
Method2.help: Enable or disable a template in the DataStore. Enabled templates will be added to the stat view list when commitCatalog is called for matching statSourceTypes

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of a template to enable or disable

Method2.name: SaveAs
Method2.help: Save a template in the DataStore with a new name

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of a template to save

Argument.name: newName
Argument.help: The name of the new template
